channel.title: Posts on Shubham Panchal's Blogpost
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Shubham Panchal's Blogpost

item.title: Why do we use the logarithmic function while computing the cross-entropy loss?
item.description: Why can't we use trigonometric, exponential or algebraic functions for the same?

item.title: Learning New Technologies Effectively - A Guide For Enthusiastic Programmers
item.description: A brief discussion on surrounding yourself with things that fascinate you to learn a new tech

item.title: Building Your Own C++ library for Linux: A Guide For Beginners
